---
title: "Sprinting to Progress: Behind the scenes of our first metadata sprint"
date: 2025-06-23
categories:
  - Scholarly metadata
  - Scholarly infrastructure
image: "image.jpg"
doi: https://doi.org/10.64000/30m1m-e8477
author: 
    - name: Luis Montilla
      orcid: 0000-0002-7079-6775
    - name: Rosa Morais Clark
abstract: "If you take a peek at our blog, you’ll notice that metadata and community are the most frequently used categories. This is not a coincidence – community is central to everything we do at Crossref. Our first-ever Metadata Sprint was a natural step in strengthening both. Cue fanfare!. And what better way of celebrating 25 years of Crossref?"
---

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="60%"}

|Related items|
|:-:|
||
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
{{< altmetrics type=large-donut details=true >}}
:::

::::
